testcase.name: DEBUG - Mis OTs Page › debug: check page content after navigation
testcase.system-out:
Current URL: http://localhost:3000/mis-ots Page title: GMAO Hiansa - Gestión de Mantenimiento Asistido por Ordenador Page content (first 500 chars): Hola, U Cerrar Sesión Dashboard Reportar Avería Mis OTs Mis Órdenes de Trabajo
OTs asignadas para su gestión (71 total)
OT-2025-002 Asignada HiRock Torno CNC TC-01 • hace un momento OT-2025-010 Asignada HiRock Prensa Hidraulica PH-01 • hace un momento OT-2025-011 Asignada HiRock Transportadora TR-01 • hace un momento OT-2025-012 Asignada HiRock Brazo Mecanico BM-01 • hace un momento OT-2025-013 Asignada Ultra Horno HR-01 • hace un momento OT-2025-100 Asignada HiRock Prensa Hidraulica PH-01 • h Is login page: [33mtrue[39m Error elements found: [33m0[39m

testcase.name: DEBUG - OT States › debug: print all OT states
testcase.system-out:
=== Total OT cards: 20 ===
OT 1: OT-2025-002 - Estado: "Asignada" - Includes ASIGNADA: true OT 2: OT-2025-010 - Estado: "Asignada" - Includes ASIGNADA: true OT 3: OT-2025-011 - Estado: "Asignada" - Includes ASIGNADA: true OT 4: OT-2025-012 - Estado: "Asignada" - Includes ASIGNADA: true OT 5: OT-2025-013 - Estado: "Asignada" - Includes ASIGNADA: true

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P0-AC1-001] should show Mis OTs view for assigned technician
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P0-AC1-002] should show OT card with required information
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P0-AC1-003] should NOT show OTs assigned to other technicians
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P1-AC1-004] should show bottom nav tab "Mis OTs" on mobile
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P1-AC1-005] should filter OTs by technician assignment
Story 3.2 - AC1: Vista Mis OTs Filtrada (P0) › [P2-AC1-006] should show empty state when no OTs assigned

property.name: skip
property.value: Requires user with no OTs assigned - test data setup needed

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC3: Iniciar OT (P0) › [P0-AC3-001] should show "Iniciar OT" button when OT is ASIGNADA
Story 3.2 - AC3: Iniciar OT (P0) › [P0-AC3-002] should show confirmation dialog when clicking "Iniciar OT"
Story 3.2 - AC3: Iniciar OT (P0) › [P0-AC3-003] should change OT status to EN_PROGRESO when confirmed
Story 3.2 - AC3: Iniciar OT (P0) › [P0-AC3-004] should emit SSE event when OT is started

property.name: skip
property.value: SSE event verification requires SSE listener setup - verified in integration tests

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC3: Iniciar OT (P0) › [P1-AC3-005] should cancel iniciar OT when confirmation dismissed
Story 3.2 - AC3: Iniciar OT (P0) › [P1-AC3-006] should show error if iniciar OT fails

property.name: skip
property.value: Requires mock failure scenario - error handling not implemented

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC4: Agregar Repuestos (P0) › [P0-AC4-001] should show repuestos dropdown when OT is EN_PROGRESO
Story 3.2 - AC4: Agregar Repuestos (P0) › [P0-AC4-002] should show repuesto info: name, stock, location
Story 3.2 - AC4: Agregar Repuestos (P0) › [P0-AC4-003] should add repuesto when stock is sufficient
Story 3.2 - AC4: Agregar Repuestos (P0) › [P0-AC4-004] should show error when stock is insufficient
Story 3.2 - AC4: Agregar Repuestos (P0) › [P1-AC4-005] should not send notification to can_manage_stock users
Story 3.2 - AC4: Agregar Repuestos (P0) › [P2-AC4-006] should handle race condition with optimistic locking

property.name: skip
property.value: Optimistic locking not implemented - requires concurrent requests with Promise.all()

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P0-AC5-001] should show "Completar OT" button when OT is EN_PROGRESO
Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P0-AC5-002] should show confirmation dialog when clicking "Completar OT"
Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P0-AC5-003] should change OT status to COMPLETADA when confirmed
Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P0-AC5-004] should record completedAt timestamp
Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P0-AC5-005] should emit SSE event when OT is completed
Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P1-AC5-006] should cancel completar OT when confirmation dismissed
Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P1-AC5-007] should show error if completar OT fails
Story 3.2 - AC5: Completar OT (P0) › [P2-AC5-008] should only allow completion from valid states
Story 3.2 - AC2: Modal de Detalles (P1) › [P1-AC2-001] should open modal when clicking on OT card
Story 3.2 - AC2: Modal de Detalles (P1) › [P1-AC2-002] should show complete OT information in modal
Story 3.2 - AC2: Modal de Detalles (P1) › [P1-AC2-003] should close modal with X button
Story 3.2 - AC2: Modal de Detalles (P1) › [P1-AC2-004] should close modal with ESC key
Story 3.2 - AC2: Modal de Detalles (P1) › [P1-AC2-005] should close modal when clicking outside
Story 3.2 - AC2: Modal de Detalles (P1) › [P1-AC2-006] should show repuestos sugeridos if exist
Story 3.2 - AC2: Modal de Detalles (P1) › [P2-AC2-007] should trap focus within modal when open
Story 3.2 - AC7: Comentarios en Tiempo Real (P1) › [P1-AC7-001] should show comment input in modal
Story 3.2 - AC7: Comentarios en Tiempo Real (P1) › [P1-AC7-002] should add comment with timestamp when submitted
Story 3.2 - AC7: Comentarios en Tiempo Real (P1) › [P1-AC7-003] should show all comments in modal
Story 3.2 - AC7: Comentarios en Tiempo Real (P1) › [P1-AC7-004] should emit SSE event when comment added
Story 3.2 - AC7: Comentarios en Tiempo Real (P1) › [P2-AC7-005] should auto-scroll to latest comment
Story 3.2 - AC7: Comentarios en Tiempo Real (P1) › [P2-AC7-006] should clear input after submitting comment
Story 3.2 - AC7: Comentarios en Tiempo Real (P1) › [P2-AC7-007] should show commenter name and timestamp
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P1-AC8-001] should show "Adjuntar foto antes" button
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P1-AC8-002] should show "Adjuntar foto después" button
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P1-AC8-003] should upload "antes" photo to Vercel Blob
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P1-AC8-004] should upload "después" photo to Vercel Blob
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P1-AC8-005] should show photos in separate lists: Antes and Después
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P1-AC8-006] should validate file type (only jpeg/png)
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P1-AC8-007] should validate file size (max 5MB)
Story 3.2 - AC8: Fotos Antes/Después (P1) › [P2-AC8-008] should show multiple photos in each section
Story 3.2 - AC6: Verificación por Operario (P2) › [P2-AC6-001] should show verification option for completed OTs

property.name: skip
property.value: No completed OTs available - skipping test

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC6: Verificación por Operario (P2) › [P2-AC6-002] should mark OT as verified when repair works

property.name: skip
property.value: No completed OTs available - skipping test

property.name: skip
property.value: No completed OTs available - skipping test

testcase.name: Story 3.2 - AC6: Verificación por Operario (P2) › [P2-AC6-004] should notify technicians when rework OT created
Story 3.2 - AC6: Verificación por Operario (P2) › [P2-AC6-005] should show confirmation message with aviso number
